raw: 617-973-5200 E-voucher. This coupon allows 50% off admission to the New England Aquarium for adult and child admission. You may find current rates by viewing https://www.neaq.org/visit/tickets/ . This is not a ticket. Redeem this coupon in the General Admission line at the Aquarium’s ticket booth for discounted admission for up to four individuals. Children under 3 receive free admission. The Aquarium pass program runs from the Tuesday after Labor Day through the Friday before Memorial Day; it is not offered during the months of June, July, and August. Annual membership of $650.00 is provided by the Friends of Thayer Public Library. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
